query:
SELECT o.id, o.orderNumber, o.customerId, c.name, o.totalPrice, o.status 
FROM orders o 
LEFT JOIN customers c ON o.customerId = c.id 
ORDER BY o.id DESC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2uGP18Gtx1WQ3Rv.root --database TTSecxitauckX3ffWcxXhf --execute SELECT o.id, o.orderNumber, o.customerId, c.name, o.totalPrice, o.status 
FROM orders o 
LEFT JOIN customers c ON o.customerId = c.id 
ORDER BY o.id DESC;
